lines.english: I lived in many such homes, O Lord,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਹਮ ਰਾਮ ਗਰਭ ਹੋਇ ਆਏ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jab ham raam garabh hoe aae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: before I came into the womb this time. ||1||Pause||
I was a Yogi, a celibate, a penitent, and a Brahmchaaree, with strict self-discipline.
Sometimes I was a king, sitting on the throne, and sometimes I was a beggar. ||2||
The faithless cynics shall die, while the Saints shall all survive.
I am so tired; now, please bless me with Your perfection. ||4||13||
They drink in the Lord's Ambrosial Essence with their tongues. ||3||
Says Kabeer, O God, have mercy on me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀ ਕੀ ਨਾਲਿ ਰਲਾਇ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree kabeer jee kee naal ralaae likhiaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Gauree, Kabeer Jee, With Writings Of The Fifth Mehl:
Kabeer has seen such wonders!

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਧਿ ਕੈ ਭੋਲੈ ਬਿਰੋਲੈ ਨੀਰੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dadh kai bholai birolai neer |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Mistaking it for cream, the people are churning water. ||1||Pause||
arising each day, he laughs and brays, and then dies. ||1||
The donkey grazes upon the green grass;
The bull is intoxicated, and runs around wildly.
the sheep is sucking the milk of her lamb. ||3||
Says Kabeer, a strange sport has become manifest:
He romps and eats and then falls into hell. ||2||
Gauree, Kabeer Jee, Panch-Padhay:
Chanting the Lord's Name, my intellect is enlightened.
Says Kabeer, the Guru has blessed me with this understanding. ||4||1||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਜਲ ਛੋਡਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਭਇਓ ਮੀਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jiau jal chhodd baahar bheo meenaa |
lines.english: I am like a fish out of water,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਬ ਜਨਮ ਹਉ ਤਪ ਕਾ ਹੀਨਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: poorab janam hau tap kaa heenaa |1|
lines.english: because in my previous life, I did not practice penance and intense meditation. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬ ਕਹੁ ਰਾਮ ਕਵਨ ਗਤਿ ਮੋਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: ab kahu raam kavan gat moree |
lines.english: Now tell me, Lord, what will my condition be?
I wasted my whole life in the city of Shiva;

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜੀ ਲੇ ਬਨਾਰਸ ਮਤਿ ਭਈ ਥੋਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tajee le banaaras mat bhee thoree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I left Benares - I had little common sense. ||1||Pause||
For many years, I practiced penance and intense meditation at Kaashi;
now that my time to die has come, I have come to dwell at Magahar! ||3||
at the time of my death, I moved to Magahar. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਗੁਰ ਗਜ ਸਿਵ ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਜਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: kahu gur gaj siv sabh ko jaanai |
lines.english: Says Kabeer, the Guru and Ganaysha and Shiva all know
Kaashi and Magahar - I consider them the same.
With inadequate devotion, how can anyone swim across? ||4||
You may anoint your limbs with sandalwood oil,
Gauree, Kabeer Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਤਨੁ ਜਲੈ ਕਾਠ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: so tan jalai kaatth kai sangaa |1|
lines.english: but in the end, that body will be burned with the firewood. ||1||
that Kabeer died chanting the Lord's Name. ||5||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਨਿ ਪਰੈ ਉਰਵਾਰਿ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dharan parai uravaar na jaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: They shall end up lying on the ground; they shall not go along with you to the world beyond. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਤਨ ਧਨ ਕੀ ਕਵਨ ਬਡਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: eis tan dhan kee kavan baddaaee |
lines.english: Why should anyone take pride in this body or wealth?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਥਿ ਤ ਡੋਰ ਮੁਖਿ ਖਾਇਓ ਤੰਬੋਰ ॥
lines.translit: haath ta ddor mukh khaaeo tanbor |
lines.english: They hold the string of the kite in their hands, and chew betel leaves in their mouths,

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਲੇਹਿ ਨ ਹਰਿ ਕੋ ਨਾਮ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: eik khin lehi na har ko naam |2|
lines.english: but they do not chant the Lord's Name, even for an instant. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਤਿ ਜਿ ਸੋਵਹਿ ਦਿਨ ਕਰਹਿ ਕਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: raat ji soveh din kareh kaam |
lines.english: They sleep by night and work during the day,
but at the time of death, they shall be tied up tight, like thieves. ||3||
Chant the Name of the Lord, Raam, Raam, and find peace. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਰਸਿ ਰਸਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: guramat ras ras har gun gaavai |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, and immersed in His Love, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.
Says Kabeer, remember Him, you blind fool!
In His Mercy, He implants the Naam within us;
inhale deeply the sweet aroma and fragrance of the Lord, Har, Har. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਤੇ ਉਲਟਿ ਭਏ ਹੈ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: jam te ulatt bhe hai raam |
lines.english: I have turned away from death and turned to the Lord.
The Lord is True; all worldly affairs are false. ||6||16||
Gauree, Kabeer Jee, Thi-Padhay And Chau-Thukay:
The faithless cynics have been transformed into good-hearted people. ||1||
My enemies have been transformed into friends.
Pain has been eliminated, and I dwell in peac and comfort.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬ ਮੋਹਿ ਸਰਬ ਕੁਸਲ ਕਰਿ ਮਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: ab mohi sarab kusal kar maaniaa |
lines.english: Now, I feel that everything brings me peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਂਤਿ ਭਈ ਜਬ ਗੋਬਿਦੁ ਜਾਨਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saant bhee jab gobid jaaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Peace and tranquility have come, since I realized the Lord of the Universe. ||1||Pause||
